issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) condition to look at top 5 cards only, (2) filter for {Minks} type excluding [Wanda], (3) reveal requirement, (4) 'up to 1' quantity limit, (5) action to place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL captures only partial effect.
Filter is 'Any' but should specify: type={Minks}, exclude name=[Wanda], and maxCount=1
Missing second action: placing remaining 4 cards at bottom of deck in any order (requires shuffle/order mechanic not captured)

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Minks} type card other than [Wanda] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
